mapper.sql: id, username, display_name, password_hash, password_sha256, status, token_version, created_at, updated_at
id, role_code, role_name, description, status, created_at, updated_at
id, permission_code, permission_name, module, description, status, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM admin_users WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM admin_users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM admin_users WHERE 1 = 1
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_users (username, display_name, password_hash, status, token_version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{displayName}, #{passwordHash}, #{status}, 0, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_users SET token_version = CASE WHEN status <> #{status} THEN token_version + 1 ELSE token_version END, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admin_users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, token_version = token_version + 1, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM admin_roles WHERE 1 = 1
AND (role_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM admin_roles WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM admin_roles WHERE status = 1
AND id IN
#{roleId}
AND 1 = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_roles (role_code, role_name, description, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM admin_permissions WHERE status = 1
AND id IN
#{permissionId}
AND 1 = 0

SELECT r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.description, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM admin_user_roles ur INNER JOIN admin_roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.id ASC

SELECT p.id, p.permission_code, p.permission_name, p.module, p.description, p.status, p.created_at FROM admin_role_permissions rp INNER JOIN admin_permissions p ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.module ASC, p.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO admin_user_roles (user_id, role_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId})
INSERT IGNORE INTO admin_role_permissions (role_id, permission_id) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{permissionId})
